title: borreria scaberrima
intro: Borreria scaberrima, also known as the rough hairy borreria, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which can help to treat various health issues such as wounds, fever, and digestive problems. The plant has been found to have potential health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Borreria scaberrima can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to support overall health and well-being.
